title: deschampsia flexuosa var. aurea
intro: Deschampsia flexuosa var. aurea, also known as golden hair grass, is a variety of ornamental grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of golden hair grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, among others. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by infusing the dried leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
